mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO openplatform_v2_api_p_t ( id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by ) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.propertyName}, #{item.propertyValue}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.lastUpdateTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.lastUpdateBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by FROM openplatform_v2_api_p_t WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1
